name: Project Full Implementation
description: Complete Odoo Project implementation workflow: analyze requirements, configure projects and tasks, set up timesheets, validate assignments, and launch.

steps.name: Analyze Requirements
steps.description: Analyze project management requirements: teams, projects, visibility, timesheets, billing, forecasting

steps.name: Configure Projects
steps.description: Create projects, stages, tags, analytic accounts, and visibility settings

steps.name: Set Up Timesheets
steps.description: Configure hr.employee linkage, timesheet products, and project allow_timesheets flag

steps.name: Validate Task Assignments
steps.description: Check task distribution, capacity, deadlines, and unassigned work

steps.name: Configure Security
steps.description: Assign project groups and record rules for multi-company and visibility

steps.name: Set Up Automation
steps.description: Configure stage email templates, automated actions, and SLA alerts

steps.name: Final Health Check
steps.description: Run project health analysis and confirm launch readiness
